name: trap-wrong-group-direction
description: Trap: horizontal bar requires aggregate, not aggregate
messages: Horizontal bar chart of total revenue by product, sorted largest to smallest
rubric: MUST use horizontal bar with aggregate (NOT aggregate). horizontal bar is horizontal so the categorical axis is y and quantitative axis is x. aggregate aggregates along the y-axis. FAIL if model uses horizontal bar with aggregate (the #1 horizontal bar mistake). FAIL if model uses bar instead of horizontal bar (user explicitly said horizontal). Sort must be descending by revenue.
